title: Assistant Store Manager - MTR Foods Capital India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - MTR Foods Capital India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, MTR Foods Capital India in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MTR Foods Capital India:
MTR Foods Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods Capital India!
